query:
UPDATE agent_execution_contexts 
            SET 
                updated_at = $1,
                last_activity_at = $2,
                title = COALESCE($3, title),
                system_instructions = COALESCE($4, system_instructions),
                context_group = COALESCE($5, context_group),
                status = COALESCE($6, status)
            WHERE id = $7 AND deployment_id = $8
